panels.title: Outbox Poller
panels.description: Executions/sec of the outbox publisher — 0 means it stopped polling

panels.title: Retry Poller
panels.description: Executions/sec of the retry poller — 0 means it stopped polling

panels.title: Email Worker
panels.description: Consumers on email queue — 0 means no worker is listening

panels.title: Webhook Worker
panels.description: Consumers on webhook queue — 0 means no worker is listening

panels.title: Request Rate (req/s)
panels.description: HTTP requests per second hitting the API

panels.title: Request Latency (p95 / avg)
panels.description: API response time — p95 and average

panels.title: HTTP Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of non-2xx non-429 responses

panels.title: Rate-Limit (429) Percentage
panels.description: Percentage of requests returning 429, "too many requests" - used for rate limiting

panels.title: Messages Published (total)
panels.description: Total messages published to RabbitMQ by the outbox publisher

panels.title: RabbitMQ Failures
panels.description: Failed publishes, rejects, and unrouted messages

panels.title: RabbitMQ Connections & Channels
panels.description: Active connections and channels to RabbitMQ

panels.title: Connection Pool
panels.description: HikariCP active, idle, and pending connections

panels.title: Connection Acquire Time
panels.description: How long threads wait to get a DB connection from the pool

panels.title: Heap Memory Used
panels.description: JVM heap memory usage

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: Process and system CPU usage

panels.title: Threads & GC
panels.description: Live threads and garbage collection pauses

panels.title: Scheduled Task Execution Rate
panels.description: How often the outbox publisher, retry poller, and stale cleanup run

panels.title: Scheduled Task Duration
panels.description: Avg time each scheduled task takes per execution

panels.title: Host CPU Usage
panels.description: Overall CPU utilization of the host machine

panels.title: Host Memory Usage
panels.description: Physical memory usage of the host

panels.title: Host Network I/O
panels.description: Network traffic in and out
